analysis.name: Holo
analysis.summary: HOT 24小时涨幅6.1%，但30日跌幅14.7%，距历史高点跌去99%。近期无重大利好，上涨可能为短期资金推动或市场情绪回暖。基本面为去中心化应用平台，但代币用途有限，估值较高。建议观望。
catalysts: 无明确催化剂，近期新闻多为价格预测文章，缺乏实质性进展

Holo (HOT) Price Today: HOT Live Price, Charts, News - Crypto.com US

fundamentals: Holochain是一个去中心化应用平台，采用非区块链的分布式账本技术
代币HOT用于支付Holochain网络上的资源，但实际需求有限
市值约5650万美元，FDV相同，无通胀压力（总供应量固定）
项目开发进展缓慢，生态应用较少
marketRead: 24小时涨幅6.1%，但成交量仅511万美元，流动性较低
DEX上HOT/WETH交易对流动性约2824万美元，但24小时交易量仅0.15美元，实际交易极不活跃
价格从ATH下跌99%，长期处于下跌趋势
risks: 代币用途有限，缺乏实际需求支撑
项目开发进展缓慢，生态不活跃
DEX流动性虽高但交易量极低，可能存在操纵风险
watchlist: 关注Holochain主网上线或重大合作
监控代币解锁或供应变化
sourceNotes: 数据来源CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来自Google News
DEX交易量极低，价格可能失真

profile.name: Holo
profile.description: Holochain enables a distributed web with user autonomy built directly into its architecture and protocols. Data is about remembering our lived and shared experiences. Distributing the storage and processing of that data can change how we coordinate and interact. With digital integration under user control, Holochain liberates our online lives from corporate control over our choices and information. Holochain is an energy efficient post-blockchain ledger system and decentralized application platform that uses peer-to-peer networking for processing agent centric agreement and consensus systems between users. Holochain enables any device to have its own chain based ledger system. By using a holographic model for data storage and transfer developers can now create decentralized applications that can scale in multiple dimensions across a network ensuring they are truly distributed. This enables every device on a network to function independently, and only requires the synchronization of data when necessary, or agreed upon by users. This means every user is in control of their own data, and never has to risk their data being sold or exposed to 3rd parties like what just happened with Fac
